---
title: "medicine_changes"
subtitle: "`medicine_changes`"
description: "medicine_changes"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/medicine_changes/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                       | Title                                                                                                                             | Type    | Description                                                                                                                           |
|--------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                    | The unique name of the event                                                                                                      | string  | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                    |
| `center`                                   | Research center                                                                                                                   | string  | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                 |
| `date_change_medication_rep`               | date_change_medication_rep                                                                                                        | date    | The date when the medication change is recorded in the system. Repeated instrument.                                                   |
| `antidiabetics_change_start_rep`           | antidiabetics_change_start_rep                                                                                                    | date    | Date for change in antidiabetic medication. Repeated instrument.                                                                      |
| `metformin_dose_rep`                       | metformin_dose_rep                                                                                                                | number  | States the metformin dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                                  |
| `canagliflozin_dose_rep`                   | canagliflozin_dose_rep                                                                                                            | number  | States the Canagliflozin dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                              |
| `dapagliflozin_dose_rep`                   | dapagliflozin_dose_rep                                                                                                            | number  | States the Dapagliflozin dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                              |
| `empagliflozin_dose_rep`                   | empagliflozin_dose_rep                                                                                                            | number  | States the Empagliflozin dose. Mg/day. Repeated meaure.                                                                               |
| `other_sglt2_rep`                          | other_sglt2_rep                                                                                                                   | string  | Specifies the name of the SGLT-2 inhibitor if not reported on the provided list. Repeated measure.                                    |
| `other_sglt2_dose_rep`                     | other_sglt2_dose_rep                                                                                                              | number  | Specifies the name of the SGLT-2 inhibitor if not reported on the provided list. Repeated measure.                                    |
| `sitagliptin_dose_rep`                     | sitagliptin_dose_rep                                                                                                              | number  | States the Sitagliptin dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                                |
| `linagliptin_dose_rep`                     | linagliptin_dose_rep                                                                                                              | string  | States the Linagliptin dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                                |
| `other_dppiv_rep`                          | other_dppiv_rep                                                                                                                   | string  | Specifies the name of the DPP-IV inhibitor if not reported on the provided list. Repeated measure.                                    |
| `other_dppiv_dose_rep`                     | other_dppiv_dose_rep                                                                                                              | number  | States the dose of "other DPP-IV inhibitor". Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                |
| `gliclazid_dose_rep`                       | gliclazid_dose_rep                                                                                                                | number  | States the Gliclazid dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                                  |
| `glimepirid_dose_rep`                      | glimepirid_dose_rep                                                                                                               | number  | States the Glimepirid dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                                 |
| `other_sulfonyl_name_rep`                  | other_sulfonyl_name_rep                                                                                                           | string  | Specifies the name of the sulfonylurea if not reported on the provided list. Repeated measure.                                        |
| `other_sulfonyl_dose_rep`                  | other_sulfonyl_dose_rep                                                                                                           | number  | States the dose of "other sulfonylurea". Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                    |
| `semaglutid_sc_dose_rep`                   | semaglutid_sc_dose_rep                                                                                                            | number  | States the Semsglutid s.c. dose. Mg/week. Repeated measure.                                                                           |
| `semaglutid_po_dose_rep`                   | semaglutid_po_dose_rep                                                                                                            | number  | States the Semaglutid p.o. dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                            |
| `dulaglutid_sc_dose_rep`                   | dulaglutid_sc_dose_rep                                                                                                            | number  | States the Dulaglutid dose. Mg/week. Repeated measure.                                                                                |
| `tirzepatid_dose_rep`                      | tirzepatid_dose_rep                                                                                                               | number  | States the Tirzepatid dose. Mg/week. Repeated measure.                                                                                |
| `other_glp1ra_rep`                         | other_glp1ra_rep                                                                                                                  | string  | Specifies the name of the GLP-1 receptor agonist if not reported on the provided list. Repeated measure.                              |
| `other_glp1ra_dose_rep`                    | other_glp1ra_dose_rep                                                                                                             | number  | States the dose of "other GLP-1 receptor agonist". Mg/day or mg/week. Repeated measure.                                               |
| `other_glp1ra_dose_unit_rep`               | other_glp1ra_dose_unit_rep                                                                                                        | string  | Specifies if the dose of "other GLP-1 receptor agonist" is mg/day or mg/week. Repeated measure.                                       |
| `other_antidiabetics_rep`                  | other_antidiabetics_rep                                                                                                           | string  | Indicates which antidiabetics that was changed, if not reported on the provided list. Repeated measure.                               |
| `other_antidiabetics_dose_rep`             | other_antidiabetics_dose_rep                                                                                                      | number  | States the dose of "other antidiabetics". Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                   |
| `antidiabetics_change_reason_other_rep`    | antidiabetics_change_reason_other_rep                                                                                             | string  | Describes other reason to change in antidiabetics. Repeated measure.                                                                  |
| `antidiabetic_comment_rep`                 | antidiabetic_comment_rep                                                                                                          | string  | Potential comment to changes in antidiabetics. Repeated measure.                                                                      |
| `date_antihypertensive_rep`                | date_antihypertensive_rep                                                                                                         | date    | Date for change in antihypertensive medication. Repeated measure.                                                                     |
| `bendroflumethiazid_dose_rep`              | bendroflumethiazid_dose_rep                                                                                                       | number  | States the Bendroflumethiazid with KCl dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                |
| `hydrochlorthiazid_dose_rep`               | hydrochlorthiazid_dose_rep                                                                                                        | number  | States the Hydrochlorthiazid dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                          |
| `other_thiazide_rep`                       | other_thiazide_rep                                                                                                                | string  | Specifies the name of the thiazide if not reported on the provided list. Repeated measure.                                            |
| `other_thiazide_dose_rep`                  | other_thiazide_dose_rep                                                                                                           | number  | States the dose of "other thiazide". Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                        |
| `amlodipin_dose_rep`                       | amlodipin_dose_rep                                                                                                                | number  | States the Amlodipin dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                                  |
| `lercanidipin_dose_rep`                    | lercanidipin_dose_rep                                                                                                             | number  | States the Lercanidipin dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                               |
| `verapamil_dose_rep`                       | verapamil_dose_rep                                                                                                                | string  | States the Verapamil dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                                  |
| `diltiazem_dose_rep`                       | diltiazem_dose_rep                                                                                                                | string  | States the Diltiazem dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                                  |
| `other_calciumantagonist_rep`              | other_calciumantagonist_rep                                                                                                       | string  | Specifies the name of the calcium channel blocker if not reported on the provided list. Repeated measure.                             |
| `othter_calciumantagonist_dose_rep`        | othter_calciumantagonist_dose_rep                                                                                                 | number  | Specifies the dose of the calcium channel blocker if not reported on the provided list. Repeated measure.                             |
| `enalapril_dose_rep`                       | enalapril_dose_rep                                                                                                                | number  | States the Enalapril dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                                  |
| `ramipril_dose_rep`                        | ramipril_dose_rep                                                                                                                 | number  | States the Ramipril dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                                   |
| `other_ace_rep`                            | other_ace_rep                                                                                                                     | string  | Specifies the name of the ACE inhibitor if not reported on the provided list. Repeated measure.                                       |
| `other_ace_dose_rep`                       | other_ace_dose_rep                                                                                                                | number  | States the dose of "other ACE inhibitor". Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                   |
| `losartan_dose_rep`                        | losartan_dose_rep                                                                                                                 | number  | States the Losartan dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                                   |
| `candesartan_dose_rep`                     | candesartan_dose_rep                                                                                                              | number  | States the Candesartan dose. Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                                |
| `other_angiotensin_ii_rep`                 | other_angiotensin_ii_rep                                                                                                          | string  | Specifies the name of the ARB if not reported on the provided list. Repeated measure.                                                 |
| `other_angiotensin_ii_dose_rep`            | other_angiotensin_ii_dose_rep                                                                                                     | number  | States the dose of "other ARB". Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                                             |
| `other_antihypertensive_name_rep`          | other_antihypertensive_name_rep                                                                                                   | string  | Indicates which antihypertensive medicine that was changed, if not reported on the provided list. Repeated measure.                   |
| `other_antihypertensive_dose_rep`          | other_antihypertensive_dose_rep                                                                                                   | number  | States the dose of "other antihypertensive medicine". Mg/day. Repeated measure.                                                       |
| `antihypertensive_change_reason_other_rep` | antihypertensive_change_reason_other_rep                                                                                          | string  | Describes other reason to change in antihypertensive medicine. Repeated measure.                                                      |
| `antihypertensive_comment_rep`             | antihypertensive_comment_rep                                                                                                      | string  | Potential comment to changes in antihypertensivs. Repeated measure.                                                                   |
| `other_medicine_change_start_rep`          | other_medicine_change_start_rep                                                                                                   | date    | Date for change in other medication. Repeated measure.                                                                                |
| `other_medicine_name_rep`                  | other_medicine_name_rep                                                                                                           | string  | Specifies the brand name of other medication where a change in dose has been made. Repeated measure.                                  |
| `other_medicine_content_rep`               | other_medicine_content_rep                                                                                                        | string  | Specifies the generic name of other medication where a change in dose has been made. Repeated measure.                                |
| `other_medicine_dose_rep`                  | other_medicine_dose_rep                                                                                                           | string  | Specifies the dose of other medication where a change in dose has been made. Repeated measure.                                        |
| `other_medicine_comment_rep`               | other_medicine_comment_rep                                                                                                        | string  | Potential comment to changes in other medicine. Repeated measure.                                                                     |
| `medicine_change_rep___1`                  | Antidiabetika                                                                                                                     | boolean | Indicates any change in medication. Repeating instrument.                                                                             |
| `medicine_change_rep___2`                  | Antihypertensiva                                                                                                                  | boolean | Indicates any change in medication. Repeating instrument.                                                                             |
| `medicine_change_rep___3`                  | Anden medicin                                                                                                                     | boolean | Indicates any change in medication. Repeating instrument.                                                                             |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_rep___1`           | Metformin                                                                                                                         | boolean | States the class of antidiabetic medication for which a change has been made (start, stop, or dose adjustment). Repeated measure.     |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_rep___2`           | SGLT-2-hæmmer (Canagliflozin (Invokana), Dapagliflozin (Forxiga), Empagliflozin (Jardiance))                                      | boolean | States the class of antidiabetic medication for which a change has been made (start, stop, or dose adjustment). Repeated measure.     |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_rep___3`           | DPP-IV-hæmmer (Sitagliptin (Januvia), Linagliptin (Trajenta))                                                                     | boolean | States the class of antidiabetic medication for which a change has been made (start, stop, or dose adjustment). Repeated measure.     |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_rep___4`           | Sulfonylurinstof (Gliclazid, Glimepirid)                                                                                          | boolean | States the class of antidiabetic medication for which a change has been made (start, stop, or dose adjustment). Repeated measure.     |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_rep___5`           | GLP-1-receptoragonist (Semaglutid s.c. (Ozempic), Semaglutid p.o. (Rybelsus), Dulaglutid s.c. (Trulicity), Tirzepatid (Mounjaro)) | boolean | States the class of antidiabetic medication for which a change has been made (start, stop, or dose adjustment). Repeated measure.     |
| `antidiabetics_medicine_rep___6`           | Andet præparat                                                                                                                    | boolean | States the class of antidiabetic medication for which a change has been made (start, stop, or dose adjustment). Repeated measure.     |
| `sglt2_type_rep___1`                       | Canagliflozin (Invokana)                                                                                                          | boolean | Indicates which SGLT-2 inhibitor was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                       |
| `sglt2_type_rep___2`                       | Dapagliflozin (Forxiga)                                                                                                           | boolean | Indicates which SGLT-2 inhibitor was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                       |
| `sglt2_type_rep___3`                       | Empagliflozin (Jardiance)                                                                                                         | boolean | Indicates which SGLT-2 inhibitor was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                       |
| `sglt2_type_rep___4`                       | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Indicates which SGLT-2 inhibitor was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                       |
| `dppiv_type_rep___1`                       | Sitagliptin (Januvia)                                                                                                             | boolean | Indicates which DPP-4 inhibtor was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                         |
| `dppiv_type_rep___2`                       | Linagliptin (Trajenta)                                                                                                            | boolean | Indicates which DPP-4 inhibtor was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                         |
| `dppiv_type_rep___3`                       | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Indicates which DPP-4 inhibtor was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                         |
| `sulfonyl_type_rep___1`                    | Gliclazid                                                                                                                         | boolean | Indicates which sulfonylurea was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                           |
| `sulfonyl_type_rep___2`                    | Glimepirid                                                                                                                        | boolean | Indicates which sulfonylurea was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                           |
| `sulfonyl_type_rep___3`                    | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Indicates which sulfonylurea was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                           |
| `glp1ra_type_rep___1`                      | Semaglutid s.c. (Ozempic)                                                                                                         | boolean | Indicates which GLP-1 receptor agonist was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                 |
| `glp1ra_type_rep___2`                      | Semaglutid p.o. (Rybelsus)                                                                                                        | boolean | Indicates which GLP-1 receptor agonist was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                 |
| `glp1ra_type_rep___3`                      | Dulaglutid s.c. (Trulicity)                                                                                                       | boolean | Indicates which GLP-1 receptor agonist was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                 |
| `glp1ra_type_rep___5`                      | Tirzepatid (Mounjaro)                                                                                                             | boolean | Indicates which GLP-1 receptor agonist was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                 |
| `glp1ra_type_rep___4`                      | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Indicates which GLP-1 receptor agonist was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                 |
| `antidiabetics_change_reason_rep___1`      | HbA1c-måling > 53 mmol/mol ved 2 gentagne målinger                                                                                | boolean | States the reason for a change made in antidiabetics. Repeated measure.                                                               |
| `antidiabetics_change_reason_rep___2`      | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | States the reason for a change made in antidiabetics. Repeated measure.                                                               |
| `antihypertensive_medicine_rep___1`        | Thiazid (bendroflumethiazid m. KCl, hydrochlorthiazid)                                                                            | boolean | States the class of antihypertensive medication for which a change has been made (start, stop, or dose adjustment). Repeated measure. |
| `antihypertensive_medicine_rep___2`        | Calciumantagonist (amlodipin, lercanidipin)                                                                                       | boolean | States the class of antihypertensive medication for which a change has been made (start, stop, or dose adjustment). Repeated measure. |
| `antihypertensive_medicine_rep___3`        | ACE-hæmmer (enalapril, ramipril)                                                                                                  | boolean | States the class of antihypertensive medication for which a change has been made (start, stop, or dose adjustment). Repeated measure. |
| `antihypertensive_medicine_rep___4`        | Angiotensin-II-receptorblokker (losartan, candesartan)                                                                            | boolean | States the class of antihypertensive medication for which a change has been made (start, stop, or dose adjustment). Repeated measure. |
| `antihypertensive_medicine_rep___5`        | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | States the class of antihypertensive medication for which a change has been made (start, stop, or dose adjustment). Repeated measure. |
| `thiazide_type_rep___1`                    | Bendroflumethiazid m. KCl                                                                                                         | boolean | Indicates which thiazide was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                               |
| `thiazide_type_rep___2`                    | Hydrochlorthiazid                                                                                                                 | boolean | Indicates which thiazide was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                               |
| `thiazide_type_rep___3`                    | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Indicates which thiazide was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                               |
| `calciumantagonist_type_rep___1`           | Amlodipin                                                                                                                         | boolean | Indicates which calcium channel blocker was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                |
| `calciumantagonist_type_rep___2`           | Lercanidipin                                                                                                                      | boolean | Indicates which calcium channel blocker was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                |
| `calciumantagonist_type_rep___3`           | Verapamil                                                                                                                         | boolean | Indicates which calcium channel blocker was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                |
| `calciumantagonist_type_rep___4`           | Diltiazem                                                                                                                         | boolean | Indicates which calcium channel blocker was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                |
| `calciumantagonist_type_rep___5`           | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Indicates which calcium channel blocker was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                |
| `ace_type_rep___1`                         | Enalapril                                                                                                                         | boolean | Indicates which ACE inhibitor was changed. Repeated measure. Repeated measure.                                                        |
| `ace_type_rep___2`                         | Ramipril                                                                                                                          | boolean | Indicates which ACE inhibitor was changed. Repeated measure. Repeated measure.                                                        |
| `ace_type_rep___3`                         | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Indicates which ACE inhibitor was changed. Repeated measure. Repeated measure.                                                        |
| `angiotensin_ii_type_rep___1`              | Losartan                                                                                                                          | boolean | Indicates which ARB was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                                    |
| `angiotensin_ii_type_rep___2`              | Candesartan                                                                                                                       | boolean | Indicates which ARB was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                                    |
| `angiotensin_ii_type_rep___3`              | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | Indicates which ARB was changed. Repeated measure.                                                                                    |
| `antihypertensive_change_reason_rep___1`   | Systolisk blodtryk > 140 mmHg ved 2 eller flere målinger.                                                                         | boolean | States the reason for a change made in antihypertensive medicine. Repeated measure.                                                   |
| `antihypertensive_change_reason_rep___2`   | Andet                                                                                                                             | boolean | States the reason for a change made in antihypertensive medicine. Repeated measure.                                                   |

: Fields in the `medicine_changes` resource.
